name: portabledesktop
description: Portable Linux desktop runtime with a TypeScript API and CLI

scripts.build:js: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target=node --format=esm && bun build src/client.ts --outfile dist/client.js --target=browser --format=esm --packages=external && bun build bin/portabledesktop.ts --outfile dist/portabledesktop.js --target=node --format=esm
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun run lint && bun run build:js && bun run build:types
scripts.prepack: bun run bundle:assets && bun run build
